commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an API-provider identity check in embedded stream resolution, a regression test for `getApiProvider(...).streamSimple`, and a changelog fix entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: current main creates a PI session with the SDK default wrapper, then the resolver treats that wrapper as `session-custom` because it is not `undefined` or the top-level `streamSimple`. I did not run the live provider path in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The PR has a concrete blocking correctness issue and insufficient real behavior proof, so it needs contributor or maintainer repair plus diagnostic proof before merge rather than an automated repair lane.
